tests.test_name: Espresso - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Espresso test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid, framework-tagged JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Espresso - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'espresso' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'espresso_single_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'espresso', contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Espresso - PO - Parameterized data-driven expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Espresso fixture and verifies that each parameterized row is expanded into its own test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Espresso - PO - Parameterized data-driven expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'espresso' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'espresso_datadriven_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'espresso', contains 3 or more tests (one per data row), and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Espresso - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Espresso test fixture and verifies that the JSON output includes a populated test_coverage_matrix on the first test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Espresso - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'espresso' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'espresso_single_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'espresso', contains 1 or more tests, every test has a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Espresso fixture and verifies that the output collapses all rows into exactly one test entry whose coverage matrix rows match the example count and conform to the Espresso schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'espresso' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'espresso_datadriven_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'espresso', contains exactly 1 test, every test has a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the data-driven examples, and rows conform to the Espresso schema
